grounding_pack: registered protocol + citation-validation (Crossref/OpenAlex/Retraction Watch) + independent statistical recomputation — handed only to the grounded arm
gold: 8 external-only errors (protocol drift / outcome-switch / selective-model, fabricated + retracted citations, p-value mismatch)
purpose: These errors are catchable ONLY with external grounding; persona/ensemble reviewers see only the manuscript, so they should miss them no matter how many reviewers. Demonstrates the categorical (not marginal) advantage of context-based review.
